title: Japanese Blue Cranes Chrysanthemum Print

imagePrompts.prompt: Delicate Japanese-inspired art of two blue and teal cranes flying among oversized pink chrysanthemums and indigo foliage. Background of soft gradients fading into a pale sun. Elegant gold outlines, pastel gradients, and serene, traditional composition. Perfect for luxury or cultural prints.
